```python
import requests

# 获取完整库存列表（分页或全量）
url = "http://localhost:51199/inventory/products"
response = requests.post(url, json={}, timeout=10)
data = response.json()
products = data.get('products', [])

print("=== 库存预警分析 ===")
for p in products:
    stock = p.get('current_stock', 0)
    threshold = p.get('min_stock_threshold', 0)
    deficit = threshold - stock
    status = "⚠️ 断货" if stock == 0 else ("⚡ 预警" if stock < threshold else "✅ 正常")
    print(f"{status} | {p.get('product_id')} | {p.get('name')} | 库存:{stock} | 阈值:{threshold} | 缺:{deficit}")

print(f"\n共 {len(products)} 个商品")
```

}

```python
import requests

# 预警商品补货订单
orders = [
    {"product_id": "SKU-001", "quantity": 17, "supplier": "深圳鑫达电子"},  # 20-3
    {"product_id": "SKU-003", "quantity": 18, "supplier": "佛山优品五金"},  # 30-12
    {"product_id": "SKU-006", "quantity": 17, "supplier": "广州键途科技"},  # 25-8
    {"product_id": "SKU-008", "quantity": 15, "supplier": "广州键途科技"},  # 20-5
    {"product_id": "SKU-009", "quantity": 50, "supplier": "深圳鑫达电子"},  # 100-50
]

results = []
for o in orders:
    resp = requests.post('http://localhost:51199/inventory/orders/create', json=o)
    results.append({"product": o["product_id"], "status": resp.status_code, "response": resp.json()})

print(results)
